skill.name: fal-image-edit
skill.description: AI-powered image editing with style transfer and object removal
skill.summary: AI-powered image editing with style transfer and object removal
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 4 patterns (2 URL references, 2 cryptographic algorithm warnings). Manual review confirms all findings are FALSE POSITIVES: URLs are documentation links in markdown (not data exfiltration), and cryptographic warnings are incorrect pattern matches on plain text. The skill is simple documentation for the fal.ai image editing API with no malicious code.

content.user_title: Edit Images with AI Style Transfer
content.value_statement: This skill enables AI-powered image editing including style transfer and object removal through the fal.ai API. It provides patterns and guidance for integrating computer vision capabilities into Claude workflows.
actual_capabilities: Apply artistic style transfer to images using AI
Edit images via natural language prompts
Integrate fal.ai API for image processing
Generate edited images through Claude Code
limitations: Requires fal.ai API key for functionality
Usage costs depend on fal.ai API pricing
Image processing speed depends on API response times
Quality of output depends on input image resolution

use_cases.title: Graphic Designer Image Editing
use_cases.description: Apply artistic styles to client images quickly without manual editing tools
use_cases.target_user: Graphic designers needing quick AI-assisted image modifications

use_cases.title: Developer Image Processing Integration
use_cases.description: Build applications that use AI-powered image editing through fal.ai API
use_cases.target_user: Software developers integrating AI image capabilities

use_cases.title: Content Creator Visual Enhancement
use_cases.description: Remove objects or apply styles to social media content
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

prompt_templates.title: Basic Style Transfer
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to apply [STYLE_NAME] style to [IMAGE_DESCRIPTION]
prompt_templates.scenario: Applying a single artistic style to an image

prompt_templates.title: Object Removal
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to remove [OBJECT_TO_REMOVE] from [IMAGE_DESCRIPTION]

prompt_templates.title: Combined Editing
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to remove [OBJECT] and apply [STYLE] to [IMAGE]
prompt_templates.scenario: Performing multiple edits in one operation

prompt_templates.title: Batch Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the fal-image-edit skill to apply [STYLE] to each image in [IMAGE_LIST]
prompt_templates.scenario: Applying consistent edits to multiple images

output_examples.input: Apply Van Gogh starry night style to my sunset photo
output_examples.output: The skill generates an image with the starry night artistic style applied to the sunset photo, transforming the visual appearance while preserving the original composition.

output_examples.input: Remove the tourist from the background of my vacation photo
output_examples.output: The skill processes the image and removes the specified person, filling in the background naturally using AI inpainting.

best_practices: Provide clear and specific descriptions of the source image for better results
Use precise language when describing objects to remove or styles to apply
Test with simple edits first before attempting complex transformations
anti_patterns: Do not include sensitive or personal information in image descriptions sent to the API
Avoid requesting edits that violate terms of service for the fal.ai platform
Do not assume unlimited API calls - monitor usage and costs

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a fal.ai API key to use this skill. Sign up at fal.ai to get your credentials.

faq.question: What image formats are supported?
faq.answer: The fal.ai API supports common formats including JPEG, PNG, and WebP. Check fal.ai documentation for the full list.

faq.question: How much does using the fal.ai API cost?
faq.answer: API pricing varies based on the specific endpoint and usage. Refer to the fal.ai pricing page for current rates.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for commercial projects?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use the edited images for commercial projects subject to fal.ai terms of service.

faq.question: How long does image processing take?
faq.answer: Processing time depends on image size and complexity. Typical edits complete in seconds to a few minutes.

faq.question: Does this skill store my images?
faq.answer: Images are processed through fal.ai API. Review their privacy policy for data handling details.
